hero.title: Grade Smarter, Not Harder
hero.subtitle: Scan handwritten exams, grade them against your curriculum rubric in seconds, and hand back detailed feedback — powered by AI.

features.title: Everything you need to grade faster
features.subtitle: Built for teachers who'd rather teach than grade.

aiCurriculum.title: AI Curriculum Grading
aiCurriculum.desc: Checks answers against official curriculum standards — not just a model answer.

ocr.title: Handwriting OCR (HTR)
ocr.desc: Reads math symbols, diagrams, and cursive across 4 languages.

languages.title: 4-Language Support
languages.desc: AI feedback in English, French, Turkish, or Spanish.

analytics.title: Instant Analytics
analytics.desc: Hardest question, score distribution, and question-level breakdown.

pdf.title: Marked PDF Export
pdf.desc: AI annotations on the paper: red circles, green checks, comment bubbles.

offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.desc: Scan without internet; grades auto-sync when you reconnect.

collab.title: Multi-Grader Collaboration
collab.desc: Multiple teachers/TAs grade one exam with consistency checks.

confidence.title: Confidence Scoring
confidence.desc: Flags low-confidence grades for review — 95%+ on high-confidence predictions.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.desc: Student progress tracking, streak badges, and improvement charts.

security.title: Security & privacy, by design
security.subtitle: Your students' data stays yours. Full stop.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliant
gdpr.desc: Built to meet EU data-protection requirements.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.desc: Data encrypted in transit and at rest.

noSell.title: No Student Data Sold
noSell.desc: We never sell or share student data. Ever.

ownership.title: You Own Your Data
ownership.desc: Teachers keep full ownership and can export or delete anytime.

privacyAi.title: Privacy-First AI
privacyAi.desc: Your exam data is processed, never stored permanently.

how.title: From paper to grade in four steps
how.subtitle: No setup headaches. Just point, shoot, and grade.

step1.title: Scan
step1.desc: Photograph the exam paper with your phone.

step2.title: Upload
step2.desc: Add your answer key and rubric.

step3.title: AI Grades
step3.desc: Higgs Field AI scores every question.

step4.title: Download
step4.desc: Export the graded PDF and analytics.

demo.title: See it grade in real time
demo.subtitle: Upload a paper and watch the AI work — no signup needed.
demo.feedback: Strong reasoning on Q2. Review the unit conversion in Q3.
demo.cta: Try it free — no credit card

levels.title: Tuned for every grade level
levels.subtitle: From first handwriting to university STEM notation.

l1.name: Elementary
l1.desc: Basic handwriting recognition and picture-based questions.
l1.example: Full credit for the correct picture and a legible word.

l2.name: Middle School
l2.desc: Subject rubrics with a partial-credit system.

l3.name: High School
l3.desc: Essay grading, curriculum alignment, and plagiarism checks.
l3.example: Thesis clear; evidence cited; one originality flag.

l4.name: University
l4.desc: STEM notation, multi-part problems, and TA collaboration.
l4.example: Part (b) proof valid; deduct for missing edge case.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for every classroom
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

languages.title: Grade in your language
languages.subtitle: Full support for four languages — with more on the way.

download.title: Ready to reclaim your evenings?
download.subtitle: Download GradeAI and grade your next stack in minutes.

curriculum.title: Curriculum Hub
curriculum.subtitle: Free topic summaries across major exam systems — study smarter with GradeAI.
curriculum.intro: Browse subjects and topic-by-topic summaries for each exam system. GradeAI grades student answers against these curricula automatically.
